import React from 'react'; import { Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { roomOptions, toRoomSlug } from './Rooms'; const RoomDetails = () => { const { roomSlug } = useParams(); const room = roomOptions.find((item) => toRoomSlug(item.name) === roomSlug); if (!room) { return (

Room Not Found

This room is not available.

Please go back to the rooms page and choose another option.

Back To Rooms
); } return (

Room Details

{room.name}

{room.overview}

Price {room.price} / night
Capacity {room.guests}
Room Size {room.size}
Bed Type {room.bed}

About This Room

{room.description}

{room.idealFor}

Included Features

{room.features.map((feature) => ( {feature} ))}
Book This Room Back To Rooms
); }; export default RoomDetails;
